title: deer-flow.metaprobe.cycle v1
description: Compact rollup of a stack-tuner cycle for cross-cycle aggregation and trend analysis. Emitted alongside cycle.done; carries only the verdict-level signal (no per-stage detail) so dashboards can plot cycle outcomes cheaply. Two emitter sources: /deer-flow (minimal: cycle_id+verdict+score+cost) and /deer-flow/stack-tuner (adds question_class+lift+n_stages).

verdict.description: terminal verdict for the cycle (e.g. lift_observed, retry_bulk_recommended, bulk_failed)
